chapter_title: Auto. Wrecking & Salvage Yards in Certain Counties
text:
(a) Each opening in a fence that is necessary to permit reasonable access to an automotive wrecking and salvage yard shall be equipped with a gate. The gate shall be constructed and maintained in accordance with the requirements of this chapter for a fence.

(b) A gate shall be closed and securely locked at all times except during normal daytime business hours.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 397. Auto. Wrecking & Salvage Yards in Certain Counties
##### § 397.006 — Gate Required

(a) Each opening in a fence that is necessary to permit reasonable access to an automotive wrecking and salvage yard shall be equipped with a gate. The gate shall be constructed and maintained in accordance with the requirements of this chapter for a fence.

(b) A gate shall be closed and securely locked at all times except during normal daytime business hours.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: Each opening in a fence that is necessary to permit reasonable access to an automotive wrecking and salvage yard shall be equipped with a gate. The gate shall be constructed and maintained in accordance with the requirements of this chapter for a fence.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: A gate shall be closed and securely locked at all times except during normal daytime business hours.
